## Review checklist
- [ ] This PR is for feature development.
- [ ] The feature is scoped clearly enough to review.
- [ ] Edge cases and failure modes were considered.
- [ ] Backward compatibility, migration, and deployment impact were considered.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, API examples, or sample output are included when they help reviewers verify the feature.
